title: Health Canada service standards and performance information for fiscal year 2022 to 2023 - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada service standards and performance information for fiscal year 2022 to 2023
As part of our ongoing commitment to provide quality client service, we have developed service standards. Service standards state the level of performance that citizens can reasonably expect to receive under normal circumstances.
This report covers the 2022 to 2023 fiscal year. A fiscal year runs from April 1 to March 31.

## Consumer product safety
- Categories A-L authorizations under the Pest Control Products Regulations

## Drugs and health products
- Drug establishment licences under the Food and Drug Regulations
- Drug submission evaluations (pharmaceuticals and biologic products) under the Food and Drugs Regulations
- Medical device establishment licences under the Medical Devices Regulations
- Medical device submission evaluations under the Medical Devices Regulation
- Natural health product application reviews under the Natural Health Product Regulations
- Right to sell drugs under the Food and Drug Regulations
- Right to sell a licensed medical device under the Medical Devices Regulations
- Registration of an establishment under the Safety of Human Cells, Tissues and Organs for Transplantation Regulations
- Site licence application review under the Natural Health Product Regulations
- Issuance of an amendment to a dealer's licence for controlled substances
- Issuance of controlled substances and precursor chemicals import and export permits
- Issuance of an amendment to a dealer's licence for class A chemical precursors
- Issuance, renewal and amendments to industrial hemp licences
- Issuance of a renewal of a dealer's licence for controlled substances
- Issuance of a test kit registration number for test kits containing controlled substances
- Claims for exemption for confidential business information
- Issuance of cannabis import and export permits under the Cannabis Act and its regulations
- Issuance of industrial hemp import and export permits under the Cannabis Act and its regulations
- Screening and review of new applications and amendments for cultivation, processing and sale for medical purposes licences under the Cannabis Act and its regulations
- Issuance, renewal and amendments to registrations for production of cannabis for own medical purposes
- Issuance, renewal and amendments to cannabis research licences
